author: y4rr
content: Fix landed: roi_align gained an explicit 'aligned' parameter; FasterRCNN/MaskRCNN/KeypointRCNN call sites now pass aligned=false (matching torchvision pretrained weight semantics). KeypointRCNN keypoint_roi_pool also restricted to 4 FPN levels (p2..p5) with assign_fpn_levels clamp to [2, 5].
